mapping_description:
Created By : Swati Jain
Created On : 21-Feb-2012
Mapping Description : Data is being moved from the Source ( CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL ) from ODS R12 to Target Flat File(FF_CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PO_HEADER_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DISTRIBUTION_NUM, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PO_LINE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LINE_LOCATION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_ORDERED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CREATED_BY, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PO_RELEASE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_DELIVERED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_BILLED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_CANCELLED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REQ_LINE_REFERENCE_NUM, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.RATE_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.RATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_BILLED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ACCRUED_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ENCUMBERED_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.UNENCUMBERED_QUANTITY, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.FAILED_FUNDS_LOOKUP_CODE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GL_ENCUMBERED_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GL_ENCUMBERED_PERIOD_NAME, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GL_CANCELLED_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.WIP_ENTITY_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.WIP_LINE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.BOM_RESOURCE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.BUDGET_ACCOUNT_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PREVENT_ENCUMBRANCE_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DESTINATION_CONTEXT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REQUEST_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PROGRAM_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PROJECT_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TASK_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.EXPENDITURE_TYPE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GL_CLOSED_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ACCRUE_ON_RECEIPT_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ORG_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.KANBAN_CARD_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AWARD_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.MRC_RATE_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.MRC_RATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.MRC_ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.MRC_UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.END_ITEM_UNIT_NUMBER, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.RECOVERABLE_TAX, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.NONRECOVERABLE_TAX, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.RECOVERY_RATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.OKE_CONTRACT_LINE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.OKE_CONTRACT_DELIVERABLE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_ORDERED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_DELIVERED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_CANCELLED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_TO_ENCUMBER, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.INVOICE_ADJUSTMENT_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DEST_CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DEST_VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_FINANCED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_FINANCED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_RECOUPED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_RECOUPED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.RETAINAGE_WITHHELD_AMOUNT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.RETAINAGE_RELEASED_AMOUNT, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.WF_ITEM_KEY, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.INVOICED_VAL_IN_NTFN, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LCM_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GROUP_LINE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.DRAFT_ID, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_FUNDED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.FUNDED_VALUE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.PARTIAL_FUNDED_FLAG, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_FUNDED, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL 
WHERE
 CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE > '$$LastExtractDate'
